nodes.label: When a security limitation is accepted, document it explicitly instead of adding mechanism.
Direction reviews first check goal completion, then survey Hermes/other harness trends before picking features.

Learning signals: denied approvals, failed tasks, and resume-pending rows emit adaptive-wiki candidates via offdesk tick and learning-scan; recommendation-only, deduped by a durable cursor, never auto-applied.
Completed execution is not accepted truth: a finished process stays pending until evidence, risks, and next actions are reviewable; accepted truth is recorded only through explicit review.

Telegram guarded execution: /decision, /recover, /dispatch require a /confirm token (nonce/TTL/observed-hash); /run dispatches only curated allowlist templates; free-form /dispatch needs --enable-runtime-dispatch; /pause is an immediate emergency stop.
Adaptive wiki promotion is operator-gated: candidates never auto-promote, the AI projection includes only promoted in-scope entries, and auto_apply is not wired to runtime mutation.
Breaking changes to stored data use the migration system in src/migrations/ (idempotent, version-bumped) instead of fallback/compatibility logic in main code.

Provider fallback is approval-gated: provider-capacity cooldowns defer dispatch and record retry_at; fallback creates a dispatch.provider_fallback approval candidate and never auto-routes before approval.
Telegram is the primary surface for urgent handling; the web dashboard is secondary.
Before finishing a change run cargo fmt, cargo clippy, and cargo test; never use emdashes in docs or comments; keep OS-specific logic in src/process/{macos,linux}.rs.

Approval before runtime mutation: runtime execution, provider retargeting, cleanup, and canonical promotion pass through explicit approval/review; dispatch.runtime waits for operator approval before offdesk tick launches it.
State over scrollback: canonical state lives in Forager artifacts, not Telegram, chat history, or terminal scrollback; important transitions must create durable artifacts.
offdesk tick is the only launcher: runtime-dispatch queues a durable OffdeskTask but does not start a process; execution runs only through forager offdesk tick and the scheduler gate.
Keep research-facet and harness/ops wiki knowledge in separate graphs/profiles; never mix them.
Build visualizations self-hosted with embedded data, remotely reachable; not Claude artifacts, not localhost-bound.
Settings TUI parity: every active user-facing config field must be editable in the settings TUI (FieldKey + build_*_fields + apply_field_to_global/profile + profile-override merge).
Redaction boundary: operator-safe surfaces strip runner-only context and secrets at every upload/share boundary; debug-bundle output is sanitized before export.
